channel.title: Comments on: Anderson Valley Brewing: Brother David’s Triple Abby Style Ale, Ep. 125
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Dan the beer man
item.dc:creator: Dan the beer man
item.description: Work on sound quality of videos. The beeping of cameras are very amateur. Other than that, great concept. Work on production value. Brother Davids Triple is awesome btw
item.content:encoded: Work on sound quality of videos. The beeping of cameras are very amateur. Other than that, great concept. Work on production value. Brother Davids Triple is awesome btw

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description: Thanks guys. Love it. Don't miss an episode. Savannah Brewers
item.content:encoded:
Thanks guys. Love it. Don’t miss an episode.
Savannah Brewers

item.title: By: Liz
item.dc:creator: Liz
item.description: hey paul! love the show, keep up the good work!
item.content:encoded: hey paul! love the show, keep up the good work!

item.title: By: Bobby
item.dc:creator: Bobby
item.description:
Pink bringing the Anderson Valley knowledge to the show. I love the Belgian style beers. Dubbels and triples are my favorite. Have to get my hands on this one. A whopper of a beer at 10%abv.
Great tribute to David Little. Miss seeing him on the vblogs. Hopefully he makes a trip to Texas and brings some tasty treats for you guys to sample!
item.content:encoded:
Pink bringing the Anderson Valley knowledge to the show. I love the Belgian style beers. Dubbels and triples are my favorite. Have to get my hands on this one. A whopper of a beer at 10%abv.

Great tribute to David Little. Miss seeing him on the vblogs. Hopefully he makes a trip to Texas and brings some tasty treats for you guys to sample!

item.title: By: Mike Vidan
item.dc:creator: Mike Vidan
item.description: I love it! Thanks for doing the show......this should be on TV!
item.content:encoded: I love it! Thanks for doing the show……this should be on TV!

item.title: By: Anthony McLeod
item.dc:creator: Anthony McLeod
item.description: Great show as always. I could listen to John all day. His in depth knowledge of beer, styles, flavors, breweries, and brewers is second to none. He also brews some tasty beers. Paul - thanks for the Terrapin shout out. Gotta support my local brewery. ;) Keep up the great shows. I always look forward to new episodes.
item.content:encoded: Great show as always. I could listen to John all day. His in depth knowledge of beer, styles, flavors, breweries, and brewers is second to none. He also brews some tasty beers. Paul – thanks for the Terrapin shout out. Gotta support my local brewery. 😉 Keep up the great shows. I always look forward to new episodes.

item.title: By: Jamee
item.dc:creator: Jamee
item.description:
another great show fellas. i can't wait to try this one.
is there any chance of an outtake of 2010 special? those are the best.
item.content:encoded:
another great show fellas. i can’t wait to try this one.

is there any chance of an outtake of 2010 special? those are the best.

item.title: By: rob h.
item.dc:creator: rob h.
item.description: great stuff guys...i will pass along the link to some of my friends who will love this
item.content:encoded: great stuff guys…i will pass along the link to some of my friends who will love this
